name: production-theorem
description: Orchestrate: one-command planning, context, plugin delegation, execution, validation, Redis harness awareness, and learning.

interface.shortDescription: One command for checklist-driven planning, context, delegation, execution, and reporting.
interface.longDescription: Orchestrate is the default Production-Theorem surface. It turns ambiguity into grounded decisions, plans into auditable checklists, hidden plugin and Redis harness work into delegated phases, and execution into validated reports with explicit reconciliation and learning.
defaultPrompt: Use orchestrate as the default command for planning, implementation, debugging, review, context preparation, validation, and execution reporting.
Orchestrate delegates internally to theorize, planning-theorem, execute, SDK harness product awareness, Redis harness agents, and other installed specialists.
Use stable checklist IDs from plan through report; do not claim done unless the checklist reconciliation supports it.

If the work touches Redis-backed harness state, THG product service, RESP/Valkey facade, TheoremContextClient, or TheoremHotGraphClient, consult the relevant SDK/Redis specialist agent before locking decisions or editing.
